treasure_room.title: Treasure Room
treasure_room.story: A stone chamber with old shelves, a dusty ledger, and a scoring altar. Return treasure here to bank points.

round_room.title: Round Room
round_room.story: A circular chamber with a cracked dome above. Footsteps echo from every direction.

dam_room.title: Dam Room
dam_room.story: A roaring underground spillway fills this room with mist. A rusted hook hangs from the wall.

items.name: Iron Key
items.description: A cold iron key with worn teeth.

engine_room.title: Engine Room
engine_room.story: Ancient machinery sits silent here. Grease stains the floor. A locked eastern hatch blocks the way.

east.message: The eastern hatch is locked. You need the Iron Key.

gallery_room.title: Gallery Room
gallery_room.story: Paintings have rotted away, but the frames still glitter faintly.

items.name: Ruby Idol
items.description: A small ruby idol with careful carvings.

library_room.title: Library Room
library_room.story: Rows of collapsed shelves line the walls. A narrow passage leads south.

items.name: Brass Key
items.description: A brass key polished by age.

vault_entry.title: Vault Entry
vault_entry.story: A thick vault door stands to the east. Scratches on the floor show that treasure once moved through here.

east.message: The vault door is sealed. You need the Brass Key.

vault_room.title: Vault Room
vault_room.story: A hidden vault packed with glittering relics. You should not stay here longer than necessary.

items.name: Emerald Chain
items.description: A fine chain set with emeralds.
